creator: romain@blogreen.org
text:
The OpenRD [1] board features a FT2232D chip for USB communication.  It
is not recognized by the UFTDI(4) driver.  The attached patch adds
support for this device (according to the documentation it is pin to
pin compatible with the FT2232C chip, so I hope they can speak the same way).

Tested on FreeBSD 8.0-STABLE, with an OpenRD board (devices /dev/cuaU[01]*
appeared, the one corresponding to the console working as expected).

References:
  1. http://www.open-rd.org/
